project_info.name: Excel Tutoring
project_info.theme: Light theme with massive dark contrast sections

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-semibold
scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-slate-500

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D4ED8] hover:bg-[#1E40AF] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all font-medium text-base shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-[#050A15] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all font-medium text-base
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 text-[#050A15] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all bg-transparent
buttons.outline_inverse: border border-white/20 hover:border-white text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all bg-transparent
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl z-50 transition-transform hover:scale-105 flex items-center justify-center

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-900/5
cards.dark: bg-[#050A15] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 text-white shadow-xl
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#1D4ED8] transition-colors group
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D4ED8] focus:border-transparent rounded-lg h-12

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a diffuse shadow. Links underline on hover. Buttons smoothly shift background colors.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-in up across sections on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Lenis smooth scroll highly recommended for a premium heavy feel.

home.hero: Dark background (#050A15). Asymmetric layout. H1: 'Master Your Academic Potential'. Dual CTA for High School and University. Abstract deep blue geometric image in the background with opacity 40%.
home.programs_overview: Light section. Bento grid layout. Distinct visual separation between High School CAPS and University Modules.
home.stats_ticker: Logo marquee or numbers ticker (e.g., '500+ Students', '98% Pass Rate') with minimal styling.
home.testimonials: Grid of dark cards on light background. Star ratings, clean typography.
home.cta: Massive blue section at the bottom to drive signups.

programs.high_school: Cards for Math, Physical Science, Life Sciences. Use relatable high school context imagery.
programs.university: Cards for Math, Stats, CS, Chemistry. Use rigorous academic imagery.

pricing.layout: 3-column responsive grid. Emphasize ZAR (R). Clearly mark 'Most Popular' tier with Blue accent border and background tint. Button 'Subscribe with Paystack'.
pricing.features: Clear bullet points with lucide-react 'Check' icon in blue.

dashboards.student: Sidebar nav. Top stats: Next Payment, Enrolled Modules. Main content: Assigned tutors with email/chat links.
dashboards.admin: Sidebar nav. Data tables for users, tutors, revenue. Approve/Reject actions for tutor applications.

auth.layout: Split screen: left side form (stark white), right side premium image (e.g., university students studying) covering full height.

images.description: Deep blue abstract background, perfect for hero overlays
Multiracial group of college students studying, use for University section or Auth page background
Math tutor on whiteboard, use for High School section
Professional instructor teaching math concepts online, use for features/about
Diverse group of professionals, crop as needed for tutor or student avatars

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement the app using Shadcn UI + Tailwind CSS + React. Do not build custom complex components if Shadcn provides them.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational metrics.
Strictly use ZAR (R) for all pricing. E.g. R499/mo.
Implement a dummy 'Subscribe with Paystack' button flow on the Pricing page.
Add a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom right corner of the main layout.
Typography: Import 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) via Google Fonts in your index.css or index.html.
Adhere to the high-contrast theme: #050A15 for dark sections, #FFFFFF for light sections, #1D4ED8 for accents. NO purple or teal.
Build the Student and Admin dashboards using a side navigation layout. Use Shadcn tables for data.
Never use generic placeholders for images. Always use the specific URLs provided in this JSON.
Forms (Tutor Application, Auth) MUST use Shadcn form/input components.
